DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-MS8-L4-10001300-MSSS8-ESC-IMR-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 8 • The Industrial Revolution

The Photograph in the Lockbox

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why is the girl sure the photograph shows a child working?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete explanation: state what the girl knows from her family, explain why that knowledge matters here, and describe what she is able to recognize because of it.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RH.6-8.2  |  MS Social Studies Grade 8: The Industrial Revolution
